query:
INSERT INTO actors (name, slug, role, agency, bio, judicial_actor, status, public_status) VALUES
('Barry L. Breslow', 'barry-l-breslow', 'District Judge, Department 8', 'Second Judicial District Court, Washoe County', 'Presiding judge in CR23-0657. Associated with orders striking pro se filings, Young hearings, competency orders, OSC proceedings, and no-bail warrant issuance.', 1, 'documented', 1),
('Aziz Merchant', 'aziz-merchant', 'Deputy District Attorney', 'Washoe County District Attorney''s Office', 'Lead prosecutor in CR23-0657. Appeared at December 5, 2024 Young hearing. Filed or associated with multiple State motions including contempt motion (Jan 2025).', 0, 'documented', 1),
('Christopher J. Hicks', 'christopher-j-hicks', 'District Attorney', 'Washoe County District Attorney''s Office', 'Elected DA. Named on early case assignment and discovery filings in CR23-0657.', 0, 'documented', 1),
('Dianne S. Drinkwater', 'dianne-s-drinkwater', 'Deputy District Attorney', 'Washoe County District Attorney''s Office', 'Identified by Master Evidence Index as DDA on original Reno Justice Court criminal complaint (March 2023).', 0, 'documented', 1),
('Mary Kandaras', 'mary-kandaras', 'Chief Deputy District Attorney', 'Washoe County District Attorney''s Office', 'Named in defendant''s November 29, 2024 pro se sanctions motion alleging intimidation to cease direct communication.', 0, 'documented', 1),
('Nicole Hicks', 'nicole-hicks', 'Deputy District Attorney', 'Washoe County District Attorney''s Office', 'Appears in 2025 prosecutor substitution materials in CR23-0657.', 0, 'documented', 1),
('Amos Stege', 'amos-stege', 'Deputy District Attorney', 'Washoe County District Attorney''s Office', 'Filed September 26, 2025 notice of bail-condition violation alleging defendant email to Merchant constituted a threat.', 0, 'documented', 1),
('Cooper Brinson', 'cooper-brinson', 'Defense Counsel (Public Defender)', 'Washoe County Public Defender / Alternate Public Defender', 'Initial appointed counsel in CR23-0657. Associated with preliminary-hearing waiver. Arraignment minutes identify him as appointed counsel.', 0, 'documented', 1),
('Sydney Hutt', 'sydney-hutt', 'Defense Counsel (APD)', 'Washoe County Alternate Public Defender', 'Substituted in January 2024. Requested Young hearing May 16, 2024. APD office relieved at May 30, 2024 Young hearing.', 0, 'documented', 1),
('Gianna Verness', 'gianna-verness', 'Defense Counsel (APD)', 'Washoe County Alternate Public Defender', 'Named in Young-hearing and APD-conflict materials in 2024.', 0, 'documented', 1),
('Galen Carrico', 'galen-carrico', 'Conflict Defense Counsel (Appointed)', 'Appointed Conflict Counsel', 'Appointed June 3, 2024 after APD conflict finding. Appeared at December 5, 2024 Young hearing. Filed second Young motion September 2024.', 0, 'documented', 1),
('Samuel Figueroa', 'samuel-figueroa', 'Defense Counsel', 'Defense Counsel', 'Substituted in 2025. Moved to withdraw June 6, 2025 citing relationship breakdown and defendant''s desire for self-representation. Withdrawal granted August 21, 2025.', 0, 'documented', 1),
('Joel Merchant', 'joel-merchant', 'Defense Counsel', 'Defense Counsel', 'Named in July 2025 substitution of attorney as counsel of record.', 0, 'documented', 1),
('Cody Meredith', 'cody-meredith', 'Pretrial Services Officer', 'Washoe County Pretrial Services', 'Named in court notes and OSC/pretrial filings in CR23-0657.', 0, 'documented', 1),
('Lindsay Coyle', 'lindsay-coyle', 'Forensic Evaluator', 'Competency Evaluation Provider', 'Authored May 23, 2025 competency report in CR23-0657. Report contains sensitive medical/mental-health information.', 0, 'documented', 1),
('Rachael Pinkerman', 'rachael-pinkerman', 'Forensic Evaluator', 'Competency Evaluation Provider', 'Authored May 28, 2025 competency report. Exhibit index states evaluator found competency under Dusky and noted refusal to participate due to retaliation.', 0, 'documented', 1),
('Lisa Foerster', 'lisa-foerster', 'forensic-evaluator', 'Competency Evaluation Provider', 'Authored June 26, 2025 competency report. Exhibit index states report found competence and described sophisticated understanding of legal process.', 0, 'documented', 1);
